nasb.text: For behold, I am raising up the Chaldeans, That fierce and impetuous people Who march throughout the earth To seize dwelling places which are not theirs.

esv.text: For behold, I am raising up the Chaldeans, that bitter and hasty nation, who march through the breadth of the earth, to seize dwellings not their own.

cnv.text: 就是要興起迦勒底人，那殘忍兇暴的民； 他們遍行全地，佔領別人的家園。

ccb.text: 我要使凶残、暴虐的迦勒底人兴起。 他们要席卷天下， 强占别人的家园。
